ML Personal Projects

This blog documents my machine learning side projects, experiments, and technical notes.

About Me

  • I am currently early in my career, working at Unilink as an ML Engineer, building real-world ML pipelines and applications.
  • In my free time, I am especially interested in generative image modelling and surrounding research methods, and I am building personal ML side projects here 👉 on Github.
